FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check the form for errors.
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Slow down! You've hit a rate limit. Please wait {retryAfter, plural, one{# second} other{# seconds}}.
CONFLICT: A conflict occurred. Please refresh and try again.
INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on our end. We've been notified.
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
NETWORK_ERROR: Network error. Please check your connection.
OFFLINE: You're offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.
PAYMENT_FAILED: Payment could not be processed. Please check your payment method.
SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED: Your subscription has expired. Renew to continue.
CONTENT_MODERATED: This content was removed for violating our Community Guidelines.
ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED: Your account has been suspended. Contact support to appeal.
FILE_TOO_LARGE: File is too large. Maximum size is {maxSize}.
EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with that email already exists.
PHONE_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with that phone number already exists.
SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
PROFILE_INCOMPLETE: Please complete your profile before continuing.
QUOTA_EXCEEDED: You've reached your limit. Upgrade to Premium for more.
PERSONA_VERIFICATION_FAILED: Identity verification failed. Please try again.
AI_CREDITS_INSUFFICIENT: Not enough AI credits. Purchase more to continue.
COLLAB_NOT_FOUND: Collaboration not found or you no longer have access.
form_error_summary: {count, plural, one{There is # error in this form. Please fix it before continuing.} other{There are # errors in this form. Please fix them before continuing.}}
field_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
field_invalid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number in E.164 format.
field_too_short: Must be at least {min, plural, one{# character} other{# characters}}.
field_too_long: Must be no more than {max, plural, one{# character} other{# characters}}.
unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
